name: okf-harness
description: Adds the okf-harness-bootstrap skill for creating, finding, selecting, or repairing OKF Harness workspaces. Requires okfh; first use gives setup guidance if the runtime is missing.

interface.shortDescription: Bootstrap local OKF Harness workspaces from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Adds the okf-harness-bootstrap skill for creating, finding, selecting, or repairing OKF Harness workspaces. Requires okfh; first use gives setup guidance if the runtime is missing.
defaultPrompt: $okf-harness-bootstrap Set up a workspace for my notes.
